questions: electrical engineering te ki ki shikha?
answers: Electrical engineering deals with the study and application of electricity, electronics, and electromagnetism. It covers everything from power systems to microchips.
Electrical engineering holo electricity, circuits, power systems, ar electronics niye kaj korar engineering branch. Eta khub broad field.
Electrical engineers design, develop, and maintain electrical systems including power generation, motors, telecommunications, and control systems.
Electrical engineering is one of the largest engineering disciplines, covering areas like power engineering, signal processing, control systems, and telecommunications.
